objective: strengthen builder prompt to pass reviewer validation by enforcing path convention, forbidden mapping, and acceptance self-validation
confirmed_facts: all issues were caused by builder output misalignment, not structural failure
three root causes were identified: path convention, forbidden mapping, acceptance validation

root_causes.description: builder prompt did not enforce repository path consistency
builder prompt did not require out_of_scope to be mapped into forbidden_changes
builder output contract did not require acceptance self-validation AC

applied_fixes.description: enforced docs/sessions and docs/acceptance path convention strictly
added mandatory mapping from out_of_scope to forbidden_changes or forbidden_scope
added mandatory acceptance self-validation AC requirements

risks: new edge cases may appear in different projects
prompt strictness may require further tuning
next_actions: record results in session-42 trial report

final_judgement.reason: builder weaknesses identified in session-40 have been explicitly addressed in the prompt
